What does this PR change, and why?

## Related issue

## How verified

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Built and ran (native or web)
- For accuracy changes: how did you check against the original game?

## Checklist

- [ ] No copyrighted game assets added (code only)
- [ ] Change is focused; no unrelated reformatting
- [ ] Matches surrounding code style
